name: New York & Company Corporate Office
description_short: New York & Company Corporate Office is a credit repair provider based in New York, New York. Rated 1.6/5 with 208 Google reviews, reflecting limited customer satisfaction.
description_long:
New York & Company Corporate Office is a credit repair provider serving clients in New York, New York. With 208 Google reviews and a 1.6/5.0 rating, New York & Company Corporate Office has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a clothing store, fashion accessories store, jewelry store, New York & Company Corporate Office provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in New York, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. New York & Company Corporate Office operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the New York, New York area who are considering New York & Company Corporate Office should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
